2604.11133.title: How Robust Are Large Language Models for Clinical Numeracy? An Empirical Study on Numerical Reasoning Abilities in Clinical Contexts
2604.11133.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being explored for clinical question answering and decision support, yet safe deployment critically requires reliable handling of patient measurements in heterogeneous clinical notes. Existing evaluations of LLMs for clinical numerical reasoning provide limited operation-level coverage, restricted primarily to arithmetic computation, and rarely assess the robustness of numerical understanding across clinical note formats. We introduce ClinicNumRobBench, a benchmark of 1,624 context-question instances with ground-truth answers that evaluates four main types of clinical numeracy: value retrieval, arithmetic computation, relational comparison, and aggregation. To stress-test robustness, ClinicNumRobBench presents longitudinal MIMIC-IV vital-sign records in three semantically equivalent representations, including a real-world note-style variant derived from the Open Patients dataset, and instantiates queries using 42 question templates. Experiments on 14 LLMs show that value retrieval is generally strong, with most models exceeding 85% accuracy, while relational comparison and aggregation remain challenging, with some models scoring below 15%. Fine-tuning on medical data can reduce numeracy relative to base models by over 30%, and performance drops under note-style variation indicate LLM sensitivity to format. ClinicNumRobBench offers a rigorous testbed for clinically reliable numerical reasoning. Code and data URL are available on https://github.com/MinhVuong2000/ClinicNumRobBench.
2604.11133.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被探索用於臨床問題回答和決策支持，但安全部署關鍵在於可靠處理異質臨床筆記中的患者測量。現有的LLMs臨床數值推理評估提供的操作層面覆蓋有限，主要限制於算術計算，並且很少評估不同臨床筆記格式下數值理解的穩健性。我們引入了ClinicNumRobBench，這是一個包含1,624個上下文-問題實例和真實答案的基準，評估四種主要的臨床數學能力：值檢索、算術計算、關係比較和聚合。為了強調穩健性測試，ClinicNumRobBench提供了三種語義等價的表示形式的縱向MIMIC-IV生命體徵記錄，包括從Open Patients數據集衍生的真實世界筆記風格變體，並使用42個問題模板實例化查詢。對14個LLMs的實驗顯示，值檢索通常表現良好，大多數模型的準確率超過85%，而關係比較和聚合仍然具有挑戰性，某些模型的得分低於15%。在醫療數據上進行微調可以使數學能力相對於基礎模型降低超過30%，而在筆記風格變化下的性能下降表明LLM對格式的敏感性。ClinicNumRobBench提供了一個嚴謹的測試平台，用於臨床可靠的數值推理。代碼和數據網址可在 https://github.com/MinhVuong2000/ClinicNumRobBench 獲得。
2604.11133.author: Minh-Vuong Nguyen et.al.
2604.11133.authors: Minh-Vuong Nguyen, Fatemeh Shiri, Zhuang Li, Karin Verspoor
